scanRoot.label: Scan Root Directory
scanRoot.description: Root directory to scan for files (e.g. /, /home/user)

ignoredRoots.label: Ignored Directories
ignoredRoots.description: Root-level directories to ignore during indexing

updateIntervalHours.label: Re-indexing Interval
updateIntervalHours.description: How often the file search database automatically re-indexes (in hours)

searchLimit.label: Search Results Limit
searchLimit.description: Maximum number of search results to return in the list
